title: Patterns of Evidence: Journey to Mount Sinai II
original_title: Patterns of Evidence: Journey to Mount Sinai II
overview: Have Exodus Explorers found the evidence for Mount Sinai? Filmmaker Timothy Mahoney completes his 20-year search for the true location of the mountain where God gave the ten commandments. In the conclusion of a two-part series, Mahoney uses the Mount Sinai Scorecard to investigate the final three of the six most popular locations proposed for Mount Sinai.
